caption: Did you know stress can increase cancer risk? 🚨 High cortisol levels can weaken your immune system, making you more susceptible to cancer. 💔 Here are the facts: cortisol affects cell division, chronic stress can lead to tumor growth, and a strong immune system is key to fighting cancer. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏 #cancerawareness #stressmanagement #cortisolawareness #immunesystem #healthyliving #wellness
